videos.title: I'm willing to make this sacrifice.
videos.description:
Magic: The Gathering Arena gameplay with Hearthhull, the Worldseed as commander in Brawl. 

Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/LegenVD

00:00 - Intro
03:20 - Deck Tech
12:35 - vs Jenova, Ancient Calamity
18:35 - vs Gideon of the Trials
28:23 - vs Tifa Lockhart
33:34 - vs Pantlaza, Sun-Favored
36:19 - vs Elas il-Kor, Sadistic Pilgrim
41:10 - vs Clive, Ifrit's Dominant
46:45 - vs Loot, the Key to Everything
52:47 - vs Kotis, the Fangkeeper

Decklist:
https://aetherhub.com/Deck/hearthhull-the-worldseed-brawl
